subject: Luvale
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Soneka nakulumbununa jijila jikwavo unahase kuzachishilamo Litilicha yakuhanjika
topics: mangana ukumise ukalu uli nakusefuka mungalila yenu.
Muchilongeselo chino, valongi vanatanjika, vanalumbununa nakusambisa milimo ya Litilicha
yakuhanjika. Chamakumishilo, valongi vanalumbununa jijila jakuzachisa Litilicha yakuhanjika
